positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of an astronaut playing a celestial ukulele on the surface of a nebula. The astronaut wears a vintage, retro-futuristic suit with glowing accents, and the ukulele is made of iridescent starlight. The background is a vibrant tapestry of deep space colors—swirls of deep sapphire, electric violet, and glowing turquoise gas clouds. The composition should be centered and highly contrasting, using clean, bold silhouettes against the ethereal background. Minimalist line-art elements combined with detailed nebula gradients. High energy, dreamlike, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Art style: Neo-retro scientific illustration, vector art, vibrant maximalism, cinematic lighting. --ar 1:1 --style expressive --v 6.0
negative: low quality, blurry, noisy, artifact, text, signature, watermark, poorly drawn anatomy, bad hands, extra limbs, out of frame, monochrome, photorealistic, 3d render, messy, grain
